name: polymarket_event_odds
description: Get detailed odds, orderbook and pricing for a specific Polymarket market.
description_for_agent: Get detailed orderbook and pricing for a specific Polymarket market token. Parameters: token_id (string, required — the CLOB token ID from event listing). Returns current bid/ask prices, spread, orderbook depth. Use this when user wants to see detailed odds or pricing for a specific market before placing a bet.

token_id.description: CLOB token ID of the market outcome
